# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create a multi-job GitHub Actions workflow where one job builds artifacts and subsequent jobs download and deploy them. The deployment job should download artifacts from the build job and execute deployment scripts. This is for our multi-stage deployment pipeline.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Multi-Stage Deployment Pipeline

on:
  push:
    branches: [ main ]

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v2
      - name: Setup Node.js and npm
        uses: actions/setup-node@v1
        with:
          node-version: '14'
      - name: Install dependencies
        run: |
          npm install
      - name: Build artifacts
        run: |
          npm run build
      - name: Archive artifact
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v2
        with:
          name: deployment-asset
          path: build

  deploy-staging:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    dependsOn: [build]
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v2
      - name: Download artifact from previous job
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v2
        with:
          name: deployment-asset
      - name: Execute deployment script for staging
        run: |
          npm run deploy-staging

  deploy-production:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    dependsOn: [build]
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v2
      - name: Download artifact from previous job
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v2
        with:
          name: deployment-asset
      - name: Execute deployment script for production
        run: |
          npm run deploy-production
